national_mail_in: see gold-domains buyers.ts — scored tier, available in all metros

buyers.name: San Jose Coin Shop
buyers.hours: Mon–Fri 9am–5pm, Sat 10am–4pm; after hours by appointment
buyers.testing_transparency: Site says "We evaluate items in front of you and explain what you have in plain language" — method not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: Family-owned shop 'established local shop since 1958'; Lifetime Member of the American Numismatic Association, Authorized Dealer for PCGS, Certified Pre-Screener for NGC & PCGS; walk-ins welcome 5 days a week.

buyers.name: Cash for Gold San Jose
buyers.address: 949 South Winchester Blvd, San Jose, CA 95128 (second store: 2306 Almaden Rd #160, San Jose, CA 95125)
buyers.hours: Winchester: Mon–Thu 10am–7pm, Fri 10am–7:30pm, Sat 10am–6pm; Almaden: Mon–Fri 9am–6:30pm, Sat 9am–3pm
buyers.payout_claims: "Up to 20% more than other gold buyers"; "We will beat any fair offer by anyone else"
buyers.testing_transparency: Site says "Gold purity testing is done in right front of you"; free appraisal, no obligation.
buyers.evidence_notes: Describes itself as a 'licensed gold dealer' dealing 'directly with the smelter'; copyright line indicates operating since 2009; walk-in model with 'gold evaluator always on duty during business hours.'

buyers.name: Credit Jewelers
buyers.payout_claims: "We Pay the Most for Scrap Gold"; "the most paid for gold in San Jose through fair, market-driven appraisals"
buyers.testing_transparency: Site says "Every item is inspected and tested using industry-standard methods" — method not named.
buyers.evidence_notes: "Trusted Gold Buyers & Jewelers in San Jose Since 1998" with 'over 25 years of experience'; 'no confusing fees, no hidden deductions'; walk-in anytime, no appointment needed; serves Spanish-speaking customers; hours not posted.

buyers.name: Crown Gold Exchange — San Jose
buyers.payout_claims: "We pay you for your item immediately"; first offer based on current market prices, no haggling — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Site says scales are "certified and licensed by the state of California's Department of Weights and Measures" and they "use a number of different industry tools to make safe and accurate assessments of your gold and its purity."
buyers.evidence_notes: Multi-location Southern California chain 'SINCE 2010', San Jose location 'serving the good people of San Jose for ten years'; 'No commission to our employees for buying your gold'; no appointment necessary.

buyers.name: Joe Escobar Diamonds
buyers.payout_claims: "Competitive payouts based on current market values" with "immediate payment on the spot" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Site says "Our expert appraisers will assess your jewelry, gold, or diamonds" — method not named; staff described as skilled gemologists.
buyers.evidence_notes: Established Campbell jewelry store with 'decades of experience in the jewelry industry'; buys gold jewelry, scrap, coins, bullion, platinum, diamonds, estate pieces; walk-ins accepted, appointments for large estates.

buyers.name: Santa Clara County Bullion
buyers.address: 200 E Dana St, Mountain View, CA 94041
buyers.payout_claims: "Paid Same Day" — "Payment on the spot — Zelle, Venmo, PayPal, or cash. Funds in your account before you leave" — no numbers posted
buyers.testing_transparency: Testing method not described on site.
buyers.evidence_notes: Appointment-only bullion buyer claiming '14+ years' buying precious metals in the Bay Area since 2011; ANA member, PCGS & NGC authorized submitter; buys bullion, coins, inherited collections, scrap and dental gold; unusual late-night hours worth confirming.
